name: Can Google Assistant optimization help me get more leads?
description: Yes, if your pages answer high-intent questions clearly. Voice visibility can support more calls, bookings, and direction requests.

mainEntity.name: Can Google Assistant optimization help me get more leads?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, especially if your audience asks very specific questions like pricing, hours, service areas, or how to book. Voice search usually rewards pages that answer those exact questions cleanly and quickly.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if your pages answer high-intent questions clearly. Voice visibility can support more calls, bookings, and direction requests.
